Mods without multiplayer support:
multiplayer_innercore_version_mismatch: Inner Core versions on server and client do not match:
multiplayer_mod_mismatch: Server and client mods do not match:
xbox_login_fail: Failed to login into saved account
xbox_help_text: Why cant I enter password? Microsoft login form is buggy on mobile, just tap outside password text field to remove focus and then tap on it again, after that you should be able to log in. I got a crash or an error while connecting to my friend, what should I do? 1. Make sure, that all mods, their versions and Inner Core version match for all players, host may display additional connection error information in chat. 2. Try connecting again a couple more times, modded xbox connection is not very stable, but after you entered the world it should be fine. 3. If you still cant connect, try being a host. Can I play without logging into Xbox? Yes, but you need to be connected to same WiFi network. Why I dont see my Xbox friend online? You should be both connected to WiFi (not necessary same one).
